title: Momonosuke Becomes Shogun
description: On pages 6–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Law, Unknown person #6, Kaido as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ahhh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: RAIZO?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: RA120- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Damn you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter how much we cut, it just keeps growing back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He must have some weakness, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is weed whacking really all we can do?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Agh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Castle Basement

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: Kozuki Sukiyaki's Secret Room

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Even further down...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You did well to sniff us out.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You make it sound like I'm a hyena!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I simply noticed the two of you weren't with the others...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That naturally made me wonder if you were up to something!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Be careful where you step, the ground is covered with mold.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I never told Crochi or Kaido about this passage,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But they were still able to find the poneglyph in no time...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...because they had a fishman on their crew...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: the all-star, Jack!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: How would being a fishman help?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that will be clear when you see it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: How far down does this go?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hmm, let's see...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I would say it goes a few hundreds of years deep.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Where is that dim light coming from?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is a glass-block window at the end of that crawl space.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can climb in there and take a peek, we should already be below sea level.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: No fair...

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
